description_long: This rifle features a compact, robust design with a black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by a wooden pistol grip and handguard. The magazine is a curved, detachable box type, likely designed for rapid reloading. A prominent carrying handle runs along the top, integrated with basic iron sights for aiming. The stock is a fixed, skeletonized structure, providing stability while minimizing weight. The muzzle is short and lacks any visible suppressor or flash hider, indicating a standard configuration. The overall finish is matte with some subtle wear, suggesting practical use in urban environments.
description: A compact black rifle with a wooden grip, curved magazine, skeletonized stock, and integrated iron sights, finished in matte black and brown.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle, front sight post, and the alignment of the carrying handle above the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden grip, curved magazine, skeletonized stock, and the full length of the carrying handle and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the stock, the back of the receiver, and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wooden grip, magazine, and the structure of the carrying handle and stock from the other side.
